sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shǒu lǐ ná de shì shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: What are you holding in your hand?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Shì yì běn Zhōng wén shū.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè shì nǐ de shū ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú shì, wǒ cóng tú shū guǎn jiè de.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет, я взял её в библиотеке.
sentences.text_translation_en: No, I borrowed it from the library.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè běn shū zěn me yàng?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo kàn, ér qiě bú tài nán.
sentences.text_translation: Juda qiziqarli, va unchalik qiyin emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень интересная, и к тому же не слишком трудная.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's very interesting, and not too difficult.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kàn le duō shao yè le?
sentences.text_translation_en: How many pages have you read?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yǐ jīng kàn le sān shí yè.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shén me shí hou yào huán shū?
sentences.text_translation_en: When do you have to return the book?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xià ge xīng qī yī yǐ qián.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 看完以后，你可以借给我吗？
sentences.pinyin: Kàn wán yǐ hòu, nǐ kě yǐ jiè gěi wǒ ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: После того как прочитаешь, можешь дать её мне?
sentences.text_translation_en: After you finish reading, can you lend it to me?
sentences.speaker: A
